advancements.caverns_and_chasms.adventur: Use an Atoning Table to apply enchantments to an item at the cost of its durability
Make an explosive modification or repair at a Bejeweled Anvil
Break an item at an Atoning Table
Copy a Music Disc with Zirconia
Use a Dismantling Table to get back a smithing template
Don the most prestigious of Monocles
Travel thousands of blocks to locate a Tin Monolith
Shoot a projectile into a Hoop from regulation half-court vertical and horizontal distance
Hatch a Saddled Egg by stomping on it
Kill a Bat by draining its life with the Vampirism effect
Scrape a Copper Bulb with an Axe to make it brighter
Open a network of at least 100 combined Storage Ducts
Repair an item with Zirconia at a Bejeweled Anvil
Hit the bullseye of a Bouncer or Target block with a triple-ricocheted projectile
Hit something with a ricocheted projectile
Hit yourself with a ricocheted projectile
Construct a Copper Golem by placing a Lightning Rod on top of a Carved Pumpkin
Get struck by Lightning while wearing a Copper Helmet
Attack a fish with a Tuning Fork
Use a Tuning Fork to capture the note from a Note Block
Decorate an equine beauty with a Unicorn Horn
advancements.caverns_and_chasms.husbandr: Rats are the lowliest and most despised of all creatures, my love. If they have purpose, so do we all...
Use a Bone Flute to send Rats to kill something
Use a Netherite or Necromium Ingot to upgrade a hoe, and then reevaluate your life choices
Use Netherite and Necromium Ingots to upgrade two hoes, and then realize that life is insignificant
Place a Rotten Flesh Block to tame a pack of Rats and pick up the leftover Bone Flute
Scrape Wax off of a Copper block or golem!
Apply Honeycomb to a Copper block or golem!

advancements.caverns_and_chasms.nether.r: Get in a Boat with a Deeper in the Nether
